connect.rule.actions.CfnAbout: A list of actions to be run when the rule is triggered.

connect.rule.actions.AssignContactCatego.Description: Information about the contact category action. The syntax can be empty, for example, `{}`.

connect.rule.actions.SendNotificationAct.Description: Information about the send notification action.

connect.rule.actions.TaskActions.Description: Information about the task action. This field is required if `TriggerEventSource` is one of the following values: `OnZendeskTicketCreate` | `OnZendeskTicketStatusUpdate` | `OnSalesforceCaseCreate`
